name: Applesauce Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the beaten egg to the mixture and stir well.
3. Gradually mix in the dry ingredients: cake flour, raisins, nutmeats, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and cloves.
4. Stir in the hot applesauce until all ingredients are just combined.
5. Pour the batter into a greased baking dish and place it in a preheated oven set to 350 degrees Fahrenheit (175 degrees Celsius).
6. Bake for approximately 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the cake to cool completely before serving. It will keep moist for several days.
